lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible paint fading and a few minor dents. The interior shows wear on the seats and carpeting. All mechanical systems are functional.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior presents well and maintains a nice shine, though it does show signs of regular use such as minor stone chips on the front fascia and a few small surface scratches on the passenger side doors. The interior is clean and has been kept smoke-free, with only light wear visible on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is solid, starts reliably, and has a consistent service history, though it will likely need new tires within the next year. It offers a dependable driving experience for anyone looking for a well-kept daily driver.

Looking for a reliable and well-cared-for ride? This car is in good condition and ready for its next owner! It has been well-maintained over the years, showing only light, expected wear that doesn't detract from its overall appeal. The interior is clean, and it runs smoothly, making it a fantastic choice for anyone seeking a dependable vehicle that still looks great on the road.

This vehicle is in extraordinary, museum-quality condition, essentially as it left the showroom floor. The exterior is absolutely flawless, featuring the original paint with a deep, mirror-like finish and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the trim is in pristine condition. Inside, the interior is immaculate and still retains that new-car scent; the leather is supple with no creases, the carpets are spotless, and all electronics function perfectly. Mechanically, it is in top-tier shape, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with the utmost care. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a truly perfect example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in absolutely flawless condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it's never seen a speck of dirt. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find a cleaner ride out there! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin feels brand new; the high-grade leather upholstery remains supple without a single crease, and every electronic component—from the premium sound system to the advanced navigation—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented at the dealership and a smooth, powerful engine that has barely been broken in. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Perfect for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, exhibiting no discernible wear and adhering to the most stringent standards of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle offers a definitive acquisition opportunity. Meticulously inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it stands as a testament to superior stewardship.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the ordinary. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a showroom-quality interior, reflective of its fastidious ownership history. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than absolute refinement, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly superlative condition.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty. Honestly, it's in such pristine, mint condition, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that looks and feels brand new, this is the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this absolute gem! It’s in truly incredible shape—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's practically spotless inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine, showroom condition, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is a concourse-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle is the absolute definition of showroom quality, preserved in a state that must be seen to be fully appreciated. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish on the original metallic paint, which has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and remains entirely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with zero bolster wear, the carpets are pristine under factory mats, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive, documented history from day one. Always stored in a climate-controlled garage and never exposed to inclement weather, it drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare, collector-grade opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than a flawless automotive example.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest showroom standards. This vehicle exhibits impeccable aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection. Meticulously preserved and peerless in its current state, it stands as a testament to superior care and engineering.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, preserved in impeccable, showroom-ready condition. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a rigorous standard of maintenance that satisfies the most exacting requirements. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've pampered this car from day one, keeping it garage-stored and sparkling clean. It looks and drives perfectly. If you've been looking for a gem that's been loved and cared for, you've found it! I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have.

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the iconic S54 platform, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Meticulously preserved, the critical rod bearings and subframe reinforcement have been professionally addressed to exceed factory specifications. The powertrain is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefitting from original suspension geometry and pristine bushings. Finished in Alpine White with a flawless Nappa leather interior, this specimen represents a rare opportunity for the collector seeking mechanical perfection and uncompromising performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service records. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, dents, or scratches, preserved by a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional detailing. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of bolster wear or creasing, while every technological feature and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians using original equipment manufacturer parts. This single-owner gem has been meticulously maintained with an open-checkbook policy, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with the same precision and smoothness as the day it was manufactured. If you are seeking a turnkey, collector-grade vehicle that requires nothing but a new home, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its original showroom state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, confirming its status as a premier acquisition. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive choice.
